name: Trans-Siberian Gold plc
summary: Trans-Siberian Gold plc, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, development, and production of gold and silver properties in Russia. It holds interests in the Asacha Gold Mine located in the Kamchatka region of Far East Russia. The company also holds the license for the development and exploration of the Rodnikova deposit located in South Kamchatka. Trans-Siberian Gold plc was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in St. Neots, the United Kingdom.
